title: feat(shell): complete layout redesign — background full-screen + avatar overlay + semi-transparent panels
completed: naia-panel (in-flow flex) → naia-overlay (position: fixed, left:0, top:32px, bottom:0, width:--naia-width)
naia-resize-handle → position: fixed, left: var(--naia-width)
--naia-width CSS var moved from app-layout to app-root for inheritance by fixed children
app-layout: width:100% removed (was causing overflow with margin-left), z-index/position cleaned up
naia-avatar-area: flex:1, fills overlay height
naia-chat-toggle: 18px slide button between avatar and chat
naia-chat-wrapper: glassmorphism dark glass (rgba 0.80, blur 24px), slide-down animation on toggle
content-panel: enhanced glassmorphism game-window (rgba 0.72, blur 20px, cyan border, box-shadow)
right-content: padding 4px for gap between panel and window edge
ChatPanel tabs: removed progress, skills, agents, diagnostics (→ tracked in #245 for settings panel)
Onboarding branch: simplified to full-screen OnboardingWizard (removed keepAlive panels render during onboarding)
Camera defaults: (0,0.9,-2.0) / target(0,0.75,0) for full-body framing
All naia-panel references updated: CSS, media rules, comments
SplashScreen: position:fixed z:9999 — unaffected by layout changes
TypeScript: clean. Tests: 484/488 (4 pre-existing skips)
Post-build cleanup: keepAlivePanels useState→useMemo, WinResizeDir type moved to module scope
useAppReady: timer no longer fires on ADK/onboarding paths (deps=[showAdkSetup,showOnboarding])
Comments: issue number references (#253, #254) removed from code
Background layer: always rendered as base (z:0), outside all branch conditionals
Background image support: isVideoFile/isImageFile helpers, background-space.webp as default fallback
GPU acceleration: will-change:transform + translateZ(0) on video element
ADK setup screen: complete rewrite with 3 modes (new/load/login)
AdkSetupScreen: i18n applied — all strings via t() with adk.setup.* keys (23 keys, 14 locales)
i18n.ts: added adk.setup.* translation block (23 keys × 14 locales)
Bug fix: onboarding never showed after ADK setup — isOnboardingComplete() now checked in onComplete callback
Splash flow fix: showSplash=true reset after ADK/onboarding completes → VRM load is covered
Dev reset: ?reset URL param in main.tsx clears localStorage (DEV only)
WebView2 localStorage clear: Default\Local Storage deleted for fresh-start testing
OnboardingWizard: complete rewrite — 6-step flow (agentName/userName/speechStyle/character/background/provider)
OnboardingWizard: pre-scripted Korean chat reactions injected via useChatStore.addMessage() at each step
OnboardingWizard: real-time background + character preview via setBackgroundVideoUrl/setAvatarModelPath
OnboardingWizard: conditional provider step (skipped when naia-remote-key already set)
OnboardingWizard: provider step — Naia OAuth OR manual API key OR skip (나중에 설정)
OnboardingWizard: TypeScript clean — fixed sendAuthUpdate import, selectedVrm→vrmModel, base config default
i18n.ts: added onboard.lab.connected (14 locales)
global.css: added full onboarding-panel + onboarding-progress + onboarding-step__* CSS (glassmorphism)
pending: #245: Settings panel — move Skills/Agents/Diagnostics/Settings tabs to center panel
#255: BGM widget — move to top-left fixed position (currently inside naia-overlay top)
Phase 4: resize handles persistence, config save for chat panel visibility
Verify: ADK setup → splash → VRM load → onboarding-in-panel → main layout flow

decisions.decision: naia-overlay stays in DOM as position:fixed sibling of app-layout; app-layout uses margin-left for offset
decisions.rationale: Cleaner than making right-area fixed too; existing resize handle pointer math unchanged since it uses clientX delta

decisions.decision: Onboarding branch simplified to just OnboardingWizard (full-screen); removed keepAlive panels during onboarding
decisions.rationale: keepAlivePanels mounting during onboarding caused unnecessary startup work (browser panel, workspace IPC); onboarding is short-lived

decisions.decision: Chat toggle keeps layout space (translateY only, not height animation) for Phase 1
decisions.rationale: Height animation expensive; avatar area doesn't grow when chat hides, but visual slide effect is clear enough for Phase 1

decisions.decision: Splash resets to true after ADK/onboarding completes (before main app render)
decisions.rationale: ADK setup is a quick popup; the heavy load (VRM, layout) happens after. Splash must cover that transition. isOnboardingComplete() checked: if onboarding follows, splash is NOT reset (onboarding is also fast/ready); only reset when transitioning to main app.

decisions.decision: ADK setup keeps 3-option screen (new/load/login) as correct first-run UX
decisions.rationale: Confirmed by user — initialization screen is correct for first-run. Layout shows after this gate, not before.
